ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comic_books" (
  "comic_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comic book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the comic book */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the comic book (e.g., Variant cover) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks about the comic book */,
  "credits" TEXT /* Credits for the comic book (e.g., artist, writer) */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the comic book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the comic book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* Unique International Standard Book Number for each comic book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the comic book was published */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the comic book (e.g., superhero, horror, sci-fi) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the comic book */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comic book is currently available for sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comic_book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address to which the bill will be sent */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_amount" REAL /* Shipping amount for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "comic_book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comic book being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the comic book being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the comic book at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the comic book in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_comic_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("comic_book_id") REFERENCES comic_books ("comic_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the payment method */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_info" TEXT /* Payment information (e.g., credit card number, PayPal account) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the payment method (e.g., credit card) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default payment method for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "comic_book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comic book in stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the comic book in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the comic book */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the comic book */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the comic book */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the comic book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_comic_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("comic_book_id") REFERENCES comic_books ("comic_book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, publisher, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was collected */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., sales, traffic) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., purchase, view, add to cart) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
